case_title: JUAN F. ZELEDON MORAZAN VS. EDGAR ZARATE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZELEDON MORAZAN, JUAN F. AS TO DEFENDANT ZARATE, EDGAR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EZ DELIVERY SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZELEDON MORAZAN, JUAN F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZARATE, EDGAR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EZ DELIVERY SERVICE $1,012.24 PRINCIPAL, $2.87 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
